sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ فِي النِّيَّةِ هُوَ أَسَاسُ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost u namjeri je osnova svakog dobrog djela.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity in intention is the foundation of every righteous deed.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الوَحْيِ، رَقْم ١].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je namjeravao' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave, br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will have only what they intended' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation, No. 1].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ يَقْبَلُ الْعَمَلَ إِذَا كَانَ خَالِصًا لِوَجْهِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis znači da Allah prima djelo samo ako je ono urađeno iskreno u Njegovo ime.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith means that Allah accepts a deed only if it is done sincerely for His sake.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُصْلِحَ نِيَّتَهُ قَبْلَ الصَّلَاةِ وَالصَّدَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman treba popraviti svoju namjeru prije namaza i udjeljivanja sadake.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must rectify his intention before prayer and charity.

sentences.arabic: بِذَلِكَ يَنَالُ الأَجْرَ وَالثَّوَابَ مِنَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Na taj način on dobija nagradu od Uzvišenog Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, he attains reward from Allah the Almighty.
